visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a checkered flat cap and a white textured sweater with a fair-isle pattern at the bottom stands in front of a neutral-colored curtain background. He holds a smartphone in his right hand, gesturing with his left hand as he speaks enthusiastically directly into the camera. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a professional studio setup. (2) The scene transitions to a mobile screen recording demonstrating the "Apple Activity Invitation" application in the App Store. Various icons like yoga and a birthday cake are visible. The man's face appears in a small circular inset at the bottom right. The interface shows selection of a red gift-box background and the input of text for a lottery event. (3) The screen recording continues to show detailed features of the invitation, including a map location, weather forecast for the event day, and buttons for "Join," "Not Join," and "Maybe." Sharing options for various apps appear at the bottom. The Apple Intelligence logo with its colorful swirling design is briefly highlighted. (4) The man returns to full-screen view, continuing his energetic presentation while holding the phone. Finally, the video cuts to a black background with a small animated hamster illustration holding a gold ingot, followed by large white text wishing viewers luck.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Slogan]: 未滿18歲不得購買或兌換彩券. (2) [Subtitle]: 威力彩. [Variety]: 活動邀約App. (3) [Subtitle]: 下載後把它打開. [Slogan]: Apple 活動邀約. (4) [Subtitle]: 我邀請他以後. [Variety]: 威力彩. (5) [Subtitle]: 傳出去就搞定了. [Slogan]: 祝大家中大獎!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (3c Tim) presenting to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with glasses, wearing a checkered flat cap and a white patterned sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor studio with greyish-white curtains and a green plant leaf visible. Much of the video uses a mobile UI screen capture showing app interfaces.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Vocal: Male narrator with a bright, energetic tone and moderate-to-fast speech rate. No BGM initially, then an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track fades in with a steady electronic drum beat. SFX: None. (2) Vocal: Narrator continues explaining app steps with clear articulation and high arousal. Music: The BGM persists with a steady 4/4 rhythm and synthesized textures. SFX: Subtle digital UI "click" sounds are heard synchronously with on-screen interface interactions. (3) Vocal: The narrator's pitch varies as he emphasizes different app features like map integration and RSVP buttons. Music: BGM continues at a consistent volume level as a supportive bed. SFX: A soft "whoosh" sound effect accompanies rapid screen recording transitions. (4) Vocal: The narrator delivers a concluding sentence with a rising, positive intonation. Music: The BGM reaches a final cadence and fades out quickly. SFX: A playful "ding" sound accompanies the appearance of the final celebratory text on the black screen.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate and teach viewers how to use the 'Apple Activity Invitation' app to organize social events, specifically focusing on inviting friends to buy lottery tickets together.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host specifically introduces and demonstrates the features of the Apple Activity Invitation app.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media tech tip video featuring a well-known tech influencer demonstrating a specific software feature with high energy.
